@21st-dev/magic.description: Premium UI component generation — thousands of components from top design engineers
@21st-dev/magic.requires: API key from https://21st.dev → Settings → API Keys
usage_examples: Create a modern hero section with gradient background
Build a pricing table with 3 tiers and annual/monthly toggle
Design a testimonial carousel with avatars
Generate a sticky navigation with smooth scroll

firecrawl.description: Web scraping and crawling — used by Researcher Mode to analyze competitor sites
firecrawl.usage: Scrapes pages for design patterns, content structure, SEO elements
